allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
PowerShell(python -c "import setuptools; import distutils._msvccompiler as m; print\(m._find_exe\('cl.exe'\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "import sys; print\(sys.executable\); import pip; print\(pip.__file__\)" 2>&1)
Bash(python -c "from kerykeion.schemas import KerykeionChartStyle; from typing import get_args; print\(list\(get_args\(KerykeionChartStyle\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', 'OK' if 'chart' in data else 'ERROR'\); print\('Has chart:', 'chart' in data\); print\('Error:', data.get\('errors'\) if 'errors' in data else 'None'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', 'OK' if 'chart' in data else 'ERROR'\); print\('Has chart:', 'chart' in data\); print\('Response keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', 'OK' if 'score' in data else 'ERROR'\); print\('Has score:', 'score' in data\); print\('Errors:', data.get\('errors'\) if 'errors' in data else 'None'\)")
